title: Fix Show All Objects Toggle for ERD Rendering
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Show All Objects toggle to correctly render the ERD on first use, so that I don't have to toggle it on and off to get the correct display.
description: When rendering an ERD with "Show All Objects" de-selected, the ERD does not render correctly on initial load. Users must toggle it on and then off again to get the proper rendering. The toggle state should be enforced on initial load.
acceptance_criteria: ERD renders correctly with Show All Objects de-selected on initial load
No need to toggle on/off to get correct rendering
ux_changes: Show All Objects toggle correctly applies on initial ERD render.
middleware_changes: ERD rendering logic updated to enforce toggle state on initial load.
comment_summary: Waqar asked for clarification, then fixed the issue on dev.
